title: 10 best herbal creams for swollen feet

remedy_properties: Tannins: Tannins in witch hazel cream help to reduce swelling by constricting blood vessels and improving circulation, which reduces fluid accumulation in the feet.
Astringent properties: The astringent properties of witch hazel cream help to tighten and firm the skin, reducing the appearance of swollen feet and ankles.
Antioxidant properties: Antioxidants in witch hazel cream help to protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to inflammation and swelling in the feet.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Hamamelis virginiana, also known as American Witch Hazel, creams helps with swollen feet because it has anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that reduce swelling and soothe irritated skin. The cream's astringent properties help to tighten skin and reduce fluid buildup, alleviating discomfort and promoting relaxation. Additionally, Witch Hazel contains tannins that help to reduce inflammation and promote blood flow, further relieving swollen feet and promoting a sense of calm and well-being. Regular use can lead to long-lasting relief from swollen feet.
remedy_constituents: Hamamelitannin: This tannin compound helps with swollen feet by reducing inflammation and improving blood circulation, which in turn alleviates swelling and discomfort.
Hamamelis saponins: These saponins have anti-inflammatory properties that help to reduce swelling and pain in the feet, while also improving skin health and reducing the risk of infections.

Gallic acid: This phenolic acid helps to reduce inflammation and improve blood circulation, which can help to alleviate swelling and discomfort in the feet, while also providing antioxidant properties to protect the skin from damage.
remedy_parts: Barks: Barks are often used due to their high tannin content, which helps reduce inflammation and soothe swollen feet.
Leaves: Leaves are commonly used because of their anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce swelling and ease discomfort in the feet.
Roots: Roots are utilized for their antiseptic and astringent properties, which can help prevent infections and reduce the appearance of swollen feet.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 25 grams of dried hamamelis virginiana leaves and flowers to prepare for infusion.
Infuse 250 ml of carrier oil with the dried plant material in a double boiler for 2 hours.
Strain the infused oil through a cheesecloth and discard the solids to obtain a clear liquid.
Mix 25 grams of beeswax and 15 grams of shea butter with the infused oil in a heatproof bowl.
Heat the mixture over low heat and stir until the beeswax and shea butter are fully dissolved and the cream is smooth.

remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Aloe vera's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as aloin and aloe-emodin, help reduce swelling by decreasing inflammation and soothing irritated skin.
Antioxidant properties: Aloe vera's antioxidants neutralize free radicals that can damage skin cells and contribute to swelling, promoting healthy skin and reducing oxidative stress.
Moisturizing properties: Aloe vera's natural moisturizers, including vitamins C and E, glycoproteins, and polysaccharides, help lock in moisture and reduce dryness, which can exacerbate swelling.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Aloe vera, also known as aloe, creams helps with swollen feet because of its anti-inflammatory properties. The cooling gel in aloe vera creams reduces swelling and eases pain by improving blood circulation. The moisture-rich properties of aloe vera also soothe and soften the skin, making it more pliable and reducing the discomfort associated with swollen feet. Regular application of aloe vera creams can help alleviate swelling and promote healthy skin, leaving feet feeling relaxed and comfortable. This natural remedy has been used for centuries to alleviate foot discomfort.
remedy_constituents: Anthraquinones: These glycosidic compounds help reduce inflammation and relieve pain associated with swollen feet by inhibiting the production of pro-inflammatory mediators.
Glucomannans: As a type of polysaccharide, glucomannans help improve circulation and reduce fluid retention in the feet, thereby alleviating swelling and discomfort.

Vitamins and minerals (especially Vitamin C and Potassium): These essential nutrients help boost the immune system, improve circulation, and reduce fluid retention, which are all beneficial in reducing swelling and promoting overall foot health.
remedy_parts: Leaves: They contain a high concentration of aloe vera gel, which has anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce swelling and soothe pain.
Stems: They contain a compound called aloin, which has anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to reduce swelling and prevent infection.

Gel from Leaves:  The aloe vera gel is the clear, jelly-like substance from the inside of the Aloe vera leaves which is rich in vitamins and minerals and has anti-inflammatory properties that help to reduce swelling and soothe pain in the feet.
remedy_recipe: Weigh 200 grams of aloe vera gel and blend it in a mixture to create a smooth consistency.
Combine the aloe vera mixture with 50 grams of coconut oil and 20 grams of shea butter.
Heat the mixture to 40 degrees celsius for 10 minutes to melt the shea butter and coconut oil.
Add 10 grams of beeswax and 10 grams of vitamin e oil to the mixture and stir well.
Pour the mixture into a container and refrigerate it for 30 minutes to allow it to set.

remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Arnica's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as helenin and sesquiterpenes, reduce swelling and pain in swollen feet by blocking the production of prostaglandins, which are chemical messengers that cause inflammation.

Antioxidant: Arnica's antioxidant properties help to neutralize free radicals that can exacerbate inflammation and oxidative stress, promoting healthy blood flow and reducing tissue damage in swollen feet.

Vasodilatory: The vasodilatory effects of arnica help to dilate blood vessels, improving circulation and reducing pressure on the veins and arteries, which can contribute to swelling and discomfort in the feet.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Arnica montana, also known as mountain arnica, creams helps with swollen feet because of its anti-inflammatory and soothing properties. The cream's active ingredients, such as sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids, work to reduce swelling and alleviate discomfort. By promoting blood flow and reducing inflammation, Arnica montana creams can help to relieve pain and discomfort associated with swollen feet, making it a popular natural remedy for people who experience foot swelling due to various reasons such as injury, overuse, or poor circulation.
remedy_constituents: Thiophene Derivatives: These compounds have anti-inflammatory properties, which help reduce swelling and ease pain in swollen feet by inhibiting the production of pro-inflammatory enzymes.

Flavonoids (specifically, Kaempferol and Quercetin): These flavonoids possess potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help alleviate swelling, reduce oxidative stress, and promote the healing of tissues in swollen feet.

Alkylamides: These compounds exhibit anti-inflammatory, analgesic, and antispasmodic properties, which help soothe pain, reduce inflammation, and relax muscle spasms in swollen feet, promoting overall comfort and relief.
remedy_parts: Flowers: They are the most commonly used part due to their high concentration of anti-inflammatory compounds like sesquiterpene lactones.
Leaves: The leaves are used as they contain sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds that can help reduce inflammation and promote healing.
Roots: The roots of Arnica montana are also used due to their ability to absorb and retain the bioactive compounds, making them a valuable ingredient in creams for swollen feet.
remedy_recipe: Infuse dried arnica montana flowers in a carrier oil such as sweet almond oil at a ratio of 1:5.
Heat the oil infusion over low heat for 2-3 hours to enhance the herbal properties.
Strain the oil mixture through a cheesecloth or a coffee filter to separate the oil from the plant material.
Add beeswax to the oil mixture in a ratio of 1:1 and heat it gently until the wax dissolves.
Pour the cooled mixture into a container and let it set for at least 30 minutes before use.

remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Pot marigold's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as saponins and flavonoids, help reduce swelling and pain in the feet by decreasing inflammation.

Antioxidant properties: The antioxidants present in pot marigold cream, including carotenoids and polyphenols, protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to inflammation and swelling.

Wound-healing properties: Pot marigold's flavonoids and saponins have been shown to promote wound healing by enhancing collagen synthesis, improving tissue repair, and reducing scarring - all of which can help reduce the appearance of swollen feet.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Calendula officinalis, also known as pot marigold, creams helps with swollen feet because of its anti-inflammatory and soothing properties. The antioxidants and flavonoids in Calendula officinalis reduce swelling and redness, promoting healing and relaxation. The cream's moisturizing properties also help to soften and tone the skin, reducing the appearance of swollen feet. Additionally, Calendula officinalis has been traditionally used to treat skin irritations and wounds, making it an effective remedy for swollen feet, promoting overall foot health and comfort.
remedy_constituents: Nashinone: Nashinone, a triterpenoid saponin in Calendula, has anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce swelling and alleviate pain in swollen feet.

Iridoid glycosides: Iridoid glycosides in Calendula have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate swelling, pain, and inflammation associated with swollen feet.
Calendulin: Calendulin, a triterpene glycoside in Calendula, has anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that help prevent infection and promote wound healing in swollen feet.
remedy_parts: Flowers: They are used to make creams for swollen feet due to their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties.
Leaves: They are used to make creams for swollen feet due to their soothing and cooling effects.
Seeds: They are used to make creams for swollen feet due to their ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 1 cup of fresh calendula officinalis flowers in full bloom and dry them completely in a warm place for 24 hours.
Grind 2 tablespoons of dried flowers into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle for 5 minutes.
Combine 1 cup of distilled water with 2 tablespoons of beeswax and 2 tablespoons of shea butter in a double boiler and heat until melted for 10 minutes.
Stir in the ground calendula powder and 2 drops of vitamin e oil into the melted mixture and continue heating for 5 minutes.
Remove the double boiler from heat and let the mixture cool and thicken completely before transferring it to a clean container for 30 minutes.

remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: The cream's anti-inflammatory property helps reduce swelling and discomfort by minimizing inflammation in the affected area, allowing for a quicker recovery.
Antioxidant: Antioxidants present in the cream neutralize free radicals that can cause oxidative stress and damage to tissues, thereby promoting healthy skin and reducing swelling.
Lymphatic Stimulant: The cream's lymphatic stimulant properties help increase blood circulation and promote the removal of excess fluids from the affected area, reducing swelling and edema.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Echinacea angustifolia, also known as Kansas coneflower, creams helps with swollen feet because of its potent anti-inflammatory properties. The active compounds in Echinacea angustifolia, such as alkylamides and caffeic acid derivatives, work to reduce swelling and ease discomfort. The cream's soothing and moisturizing effects also help to calm and hydrate the skin, promoting a faster recovery from swelling and inflammation. Regular use of Echinacea angustifolia cream may provide long-lasting relief from swollen feet.
remedy_constituents: Iridoid Glycosides: These compounds have anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce swelling in the feet by reducing inflammation and promoting healing.

Alkaloids (Isoquinoline and Indole): These alkaloids have been shown to possess analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help alleviate pain and reduce swelling associated with swollen feet.

Flavonoids (Quercetin and Kaempferol): These flavonoids have potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the feet, thereby alleviating swelling and promoting overall health.
remedy_parts: Roots: Roots are commonly used due to their high concentration of phenolic compounds and alkylamides, which have anti-inflammatory properties that can help reduce swelling.
Rhyzomes: Rhyzomes are used for their ability to absorb and retain moisture, making them a popular ingredient in creams for swollen feet to provide hydration and relief.
Barks: Barks are used due to their antimicrobial properties, which can help prevent infection and promote healing in the skin, reducing the appearance of swelling.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 1-2 pounds of echinacea angustifolia roots in the fall season after the first frost.
Dry the roots at 40°c for 2-3 days to reduce moisture content to 10%.
Extract the medicinal compounds from the dried roots using a solvent like ethanol at a ratio of 1:5.
Mix the extracted echinacea angustifolia extract with a carrier oil like coconut oil in a ratio of 1:10.
Whip the mixture with beeswax at a ratio of 1:1 to create a smooth and creamy texture.

remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Herbal wintergreen creams contain methyl salicylate, which has anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce swelling and pain in the feet.
Pain-relieving: The methyl salicylate in wintergreen cream also works as a natural analgesic, providing relief from soreness and discomfort caused by swollen feet.
Antioxidant: Wintergreen's antioxidant properties help protect the skin from further damage and promote healthy circulation, which can aid in reducing swelling and promoting recovery.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Gaultheria procumbens, also known as wintergreen, creams helps with swollen feet because of its anti-inflammatory properties. The cream contains methyl salicylate, a natural pain reliever derived from the plant's leaves. It helps reduce swelling and discomfort in the feet by reducing inflammation and relaxing muscles. Additionally, wintergreen creams have antiseptic and antispasmodic properties, which promote healing and relieve pain, making it a popular natural remedy for swollen feet and tired legs.
remedy_constituents: Salicin: A phenolic glycoside that acts as a natural analgesic and anti-inflammatory agent, which helps reduce swelling and pain in the feet.
Methyl salicylate: A volatile oil that has anti-inflammatory properties, which may help alleviate swelling and pain associated with conditions like plantar fasciitis or ankle sprains.
Gaultherin: A phenolic compound that has potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help reduce inflammation and promote healing of damaged tissues in the feet.
remedy_parts: Roots: Used to create creams due to their anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties.
Leaves: Used for their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties to soothe and calm swollen feet.
Barks: Used for their antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties to reduce inflammation and promote healing in creams for swollen feet.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 1 to 2 ounces of fresh gaultheria procumbens leaves and stems when the plant is in full bloom.
Steep 2 ounces of the harvested gaultheria procumbens in 2 cups of boiling water for 10 to 15 minutes.
Strain the liquid mixture through a cheesecloth or a fine-mesh sieve into a clean bowl.
Mix 1 tablespoon of beeswax and 2 tablespoons of coconut oil in a double boiler.
Add the strained gaultheria procumbens liquid to the beeswax and coconut oil mixture and heat until combined.

remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Curcumin, a compound found in curry plant cream, has antioxidant properties that help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the body, which can contribute to swelling and discomfort in the feet.

Anti-inflammatory properties: The turmeric in curry plant cream contains anti-inflammatory compounds like curcuminoids, which have been shown to reduce pain and inflammation associated with conditions like arthritis, gout, and swelling in the feet.

Antimicrobial properties: The antimicrobial properties of curry plant cream can help prevent bacterial and fungal infections that may exacerbate foot swelling and discomfort, such as athlete's foot or toenail fungus.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Helichrysum italicum, also known as curry plant, creams helps with swollen feet because of its potent anti-inflammatory properties. The cream's active compounds, such as bornyl acetate and italidione, work to reduce swelling and ease pain. This natural remedy promotes blood circulation, which helps to flush out excess fluids and reduce inflammation in the feet. By applying Helichrysum italicum cream, individuals can find relief from swollen feet, improving their overall comfort and mobility. Its soothing effects also promote relaxation and well-being.
remedy_constituents: Neryl Acetate: This sesquiterpene helps reduce inflammation and edema in swollen feet by inhibiting the production of pro-inflammatory enzymes.
Italidione: A sesquiterpene lactone, italidione has anti-inflammatory properties that help alleviate swelling and pain in the feet by blocking the action of inflammatory mediators.

Phenolic Acids (e.g., Rosmarinic Acid): These compounds possess antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in swollen feet, promoting faster healing and relief.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Leaves are commonly used in creams for swollen feet due to their anti-inflammatory properties.
Flowers: Flowers are used to make creams for swollen feet because they contain compounds that help reduce swelling and pain.
Roots: Roots are used in creams for swollen feet due to their diuretic properties, which help reduce fluid retention and swelling.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 1-2 pounds of helichrysum italicum flowers at peak bloom for optimal potency and flavor.
Dry the flowers in a single layer at 40°c for 2 hours or until they reach 10% moisture content.
Infuse 1 tablespoon of dried flowers in 2 ounces of carrier oil like sweet almond oil for 2 weeks.
Strain the infused oil through a cheesecloth or coffee filter into a clean glass container and discard solids.
Add 2 tablespoons of beeswax and 2 ounces of vitamin e oil to the infused oil mixture then heat until melted.

remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Lavender's anti-inflammatory compounds help reduce swelling and alleviate pain in the feet by inhibiting the production of inflammatory mediators, thereby providing relief from discomfort.

Antimicrobial properties: The antimicrobial properties of lavender cream help combat bacterial and fungal infections that can contribute to foot odor, sweatiness, and discomfort, promoting a healthy and dry skin environment.

Calming and relaxing properties: Lavender's calming and relaxing effects can help reduce stress and anxiety, which are common triggers for swelling in the feet, by promoting relaxation and reducing cortisol levels.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Lavandula angustifolia, also known as English lavender, creams helps with swollen feet because of its anti-inflammatory and soothing properties. The calming effects of lavender can help reduce swelling and ease discomfort. The cream's ability to improve circulation and reduce inflammation makes it an effective remedy for swollen feet. Additionally, the relaxing scent of lavender can help alleviate stress and promote better sleep, which is essential for overall foot health. This natural remedy provides a gentle and non-invasive solution for swollen feet.
remedy_constituents: Linalool: This terpene has anti-inflammatory properties, which help to reduce swelling and alleviate pain in swollen feet.

Linalyl acetate: As a terpene ester, linalyl acetate exhibits a sedative and anti-inflammatory effect, which can contribute to the relief of swollen feet by reducing inflammation and promoting relaxation.
Lavandulol: This terpene has been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce swelling and promote healing in swollen feet.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Known for their calming properties, which help reduce inflammation and soothe swollen feet.
Flowers: Used for their antiseptic and antispasmodic properties, which aid in reducing swelling and promoting relaxation.
Stems: Utilized for their astringent properties, helping to reduce fluid retention and alleviate swollen feet.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100g of fresh lavandula angustifolia flowers at dawn on a dry day when in full bloom.
Dry the flowers in a single layer at 35°c for 2 hours or until crumbly.
Steep 20g of dried flowers in 100ml of jojoba oil at 60°c for 2 hours.
Strain and filter the infused oil through a coffee filter paper to remove plant residues.
Mix 20g of beeswax and 10g of emulsifying wax with the cooled infused oil in a double boiler.

remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Chamomile's anti-inflammatory properties help reduce swelling and relieve pain associated with swollen feet, making it a natural remedy to alleviate discomfort.
Antioxidant: Chamomile's antioxidant properties help protect the skin from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to inflammation and swelling in the feet.

Antimicrobial: Chamomile's antimicrobial properties help combat bacterial and fungal infections that can cause foot odor, athlete's foot, and other issues related to sweaty or wet feet, further contributing to swelling.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Matricaria chamomilla, also known as chamomile, creams helps with swollen feet because of its anti-inflammatory and soothing properties. The active compounds in chamomile, such as apigenin and luteolin, have been shown to reduce swelling and ease pain in the feet. Additionally, chamomile's calming effects can help to relax tense muscles and improve circulation, which can contribute to reduced swelling and discomfort. remedy_constituents: Apigenin: As a flavonoid, apigenin helps with swollen feet by reducing inflammation and relaxing muscles, providing relief from pain and discomfort.
Luteolin: With its potent anti-inflammatory properties, luteolin helps alleviate swollen feet by decreasing swelling and promoting blood flow to the affected area.
α-Bisabolol: This sesquiterpene alcohol helps with swollen feet by reducing inflammation and promoting the healing of damaged tissues, while also providing a soothing effect on the skin.
remedy_parts: Flowers: They are rich in anti-inflammatory and soothing compounds, making them effective in reducing swelling and discomfort.
Leaves: They contain apigenin, a flavonoid with anti-inflammatory properties that help to alleviate swelling and pain.
Seeds (Note: Not all sources confirm that the seeds of Matricaria chamomilla are used, but the flowers and leaves are confirmed to be used, and the seeds are sometimes used in herbal medicine)
remedy_recipe: Harvest 1 pound of dried matricaria chamomilla flowers in mid-summer when in full bloom and dry them completely.
Infuse 8 ounces of dried flowers in 4 cups of boiling water for 10-15 minutes to make a strong tea.
Strain the tea through cheesecloth into a bowl and discard the solids to obtain a clear liquid extract.
Combine 8 ounces of the cooled liquid extract with 8 ounces of distilled water and 2 ounces of beeswax in a saucepan.
Heat the mixture over low heat for 10-15 minutes and then let it cool and thicken into a creamy consistency.

remedy_properties: Antibacterial properties: Tea tree oil's antibacterial properties help combat bacterial infections that can cause swelling and inflammation in the feet, promoting healing and reducing redness.
Anti-inflammatory properties: The anti-inflammatory compounds in tea tree cream reduce swelling and pain by constricting blood vessels and reducing fluid buildup, providing relief from discomfort.
Antioxidant properties: Antioxidants in tea tree cream help protect the skin from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to inflammation and swelling.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Melaleuca alternifolia, also known as tea tree, creams helps with swollen feet because of its potent anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The active compound, terpinen-4-ol, reduces swelling and soothes irritated skin, providing relief from discomfort and pain. The cream's cooling effect also helps to reduce heat and inflammation, promoting blood flow and relaxation in the affected area. remedy_constituents: Cineole (Eucalyptol): As an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compound, cineole helps reduce swelling and relieve pain in swollen feet by reducing inflammation and promoting blood circulation.
Caryophyllene oxide: This sesquiterpene has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help alleviate swelling and pain in swollen feet by reducing inflammation and promoting tissue repair.

Limonene: As an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compound, limonene helps reduce swelling and relieve pain in swollen feet by promoting blood circulation, reducing inflammation, and preventing bacterial growth.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Rich in tea tree oil, which is known for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties.
Seeds: Contain compounds that may help reduce swelling and ease pain.
Buds: May contribute to the overall anti-inflammatory and soothing effects of the creams.
remedy_recipe: Infuse 250 grams of melaleuca alternifolia leaves in 1 liter of distilled water for 30 to 40 minutes.
Strain the liquid through a cheesecloth into a clean container discarding the solids after 10 minutes.
Combine the infused liquid with 250 grams of beeswax and 100 grams of cocoa butter in a double boiler.
Heat the mixture gently while stirring occasionally until the beeswax and cocoa butter have melted in 20 minutes.
Add 20 grams of vitamin e oil and 50 grams of shea butter to the mixture then whip until smooth in 10 minutes.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Plantain creams helps with swollen feet because of their potent anti-inflammatory properties. The cream absorbs quickly into the skin, reducing swelling and alleviating discomfort. The plantain extract in these creams has natural astringent properties that help to tighten and firm up the skin, while also promoting blood circulation. This combination of benefits provides relief from achy, swollen feet and leaves them feeling soft, smooth, and rejuvenated. As a result, many people find herbal plantain creams to be an effective and natural solution for soothing and calming their tired feet.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Plantain creams contain anti-inflammatory compounds like allantoin and cinnamic acid, which reduce swelling and alleviate pain by blocking prostaglandins and other inflammatory mediators.

Antioxidant properties: The antioxidants present in plantain creams, such as flavonoids and phenolic acids, help to neutralize free radicals that can exacerbate inflammation and damage to the skin and tissues, promoting faster recovery from swelling and discomfort.

Wound healing properties: Plantain's mucilage, a gel-like substance, forms a protective barrier on the skin's surface, creating an environment conducive to wound healing by reducing inflammation, preventing infection, and promoting tissue regeneration, which can help alleviate swelling and improve overall foot health.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in anti-inflammatory compounds, plantain roots help reduce swelling and ease pain in the feet.
Rhyzomes: Containing antioxidants and antimicrobial agents, rhyzomes soothe irritation and promote healing in affected areas.
remedy_recipe: Harvest dried aerial parts of plantago major in amounts of 30-40 grams.
Grind the dried herb into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 10 minutes.
Mix 20 grams of the powdered herb with 100 milliliters of sweet almond oil and 50 milliliters of beeswax for 5 minutes.
Heat the mixture in a double boiler at low heat for 30-40 minutes or until the wax melts and the mixture thickens.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth and let it cool to room temperature before filling into jars.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: White willow creams helps with swollen feet because they contain salicin, a natural anti-inflammatory compound similar to aspirin. When applied topically, salicin absorbs into the skin and reduces swelling and pain by blocking the production of prostaglandins, which cause inflammation. Additionally, white willow creams help to improve blood circulation, which can also contribute to reducing swelling in the feet. As a result, using herbal white willow creams can provide fast and effective relief from swollen feet.
remedy_properties: Salicin: White willow cream contains salicin, a natural pain reliever similar to aspirin, which helps reduce inflammation and relieve discomfort associated with swollen feet.
Antioxidants: The antioxidants present in white willow cream work to neutralize free radicals that can cause oxidative stress and further exacerbate swelling in the feet.
Anti-inflammatory compounds: The cream's anti-inflammatory compounds help reduce inflammation and alleviate pain, stiffness, and soreness associated with swollen feet.
remedy_parts: Barks: Containing salicin, a compound similar to aspirin, which helps reduce pain and inflammation in swollen feet.
Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, which help soothe and calm irritated skin and alleviate discomfort.
remedy_recipe: Gather ingredients including dried salix alba bark extract, coconut oil, beeswax, and vitamin e oil in proportions of 20g:50ml:15g:5ml respectively.
Combine the dried salix alba bark extract with boiling water to create a decoction allowing it to steep for 30 minutes.
Strain the decoction through a cheesecloth into a clean container and discard the solids after letting it cool to room temperature.
Mix the strained liquid with coconut oil, beeswax, and vitamin e oil in a double boiler melting the wax and cooling the mixture until it reaches a temperature of 60°c.
Pour the cooled cream into glass containers filling them up to the brim and storing them in a cool dry place for a minimum of 24 hours before use.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Soapwort creams helps with swollen feet because of its unique properties that work to reduce inflammation and relieve pressure. The saponin content in soapwort helps to break down and disperse excess fluid, reducing swelling and discomfort. Additionally, the cream's soothing and moisturizing effects help to calm irritated skin, promote circulation, and soften thickened skin. As a result, soapwort creams provide effective relief for swollen feet, leaving them feeling soft, smooth, and refreshed.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Soapwort creams contain saponins, which have anti-inflammatory effects that help reduce swelling and pain in swollen feet.

Antioxidant properties: The antioxidants present in soapwort creams help neutralize free radicals that can contribute to inflammation and damage caused by poor circulation or injury, reducing the appearance of swelling and discoloration.

Soothing and moisturizing properties: Soapwort creams have a soothing and moisturizing effect on the skin, helping to reduce itching and discomfort associated with swollen feet, while also improving hydration and elasticity.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the soapwort plant contain saponins, which help to reduce inflammation and relieve pain associated with swollen feet.
Rhyzomes: The rhyzomes of the soapwort plant have anti-inflammatory properties that can help to soothe and calm irritated skin caused by swelling.
remedy_recipe: Harvest dried saponaria officinalis roots and grind them into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 10 minutes.
Combine 20g of the ground saponaria officinalis root powder with 100g of sweet almond oil in a heat-resistant mixing bowl.
Heat the mixture at low temperature under stirring for 30 minutes until it reaches a warm and smooth consistency.
Add 10% beeswax to the warm mixture and stir well to ensure even distribution before pouring into containers for setting overnight.
Allow the cream to set at room temperature for 6 hours or in the refrigerator for 2 hours before using on swollen feet.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Broad-leaved lime creams helps with swollen feet because they possess anti-inflammatory properties that reduce swelling and ease discomfort. The cream's active ingredients, such as flavonoids and terpenes, work to constrict blood vessels, thereby decreasing fluid retention and alleviating puffiness. Additionally, the cream's moisturizing properties help to soothe dry skin and reduce itching, further contributing to a sense of relief and comfort for individuals experiencing swollen feet.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties: Tilia platyphyllos has been shown to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress, which can contribute to swelling in the feet.
Analgesic and anti-pain properties: The plant contains compounds that have pain-relieving properties, which may help alleviate discomfort and pain associated with swollen feet.
Vasodilatory effects: Tilia platyphyllos has been shown to dilate blood vessels, which can improve circulation and reduce swelling in the feet.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in anti-inflammatory compounds that help reduce swelling and pain in feet.
Barks: Containing antioxidants and flavonoids that promote blood flow and relaxation, reducing inflammation and discomfort.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100g of dried tilia platyphyllos flowers and grind them into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 10 minutes.
Combine the ground tilia platyphyllos powder with 20ml of sweet almond oil and 10ml of coconut oil in a heat-resistant glass bowl.
Heat the mixture in a double boiler at low heat for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the oils have infused the herbal extract for 15-20 minutes.
Remove the infusion from the heat and let it cool to room temperature before adding 5ml of beeswax and mixing until fully incorporated within 5 minutes.
Pour the mixture into sterilized glass jars and store in a cool, dark place for at least 2 weeks before use to allow the cream to mature and thicken completely.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Stinging nettle creams helps with swollen feet because of its natural anti-inflammatory properties. The cream's active ingredients, such as stinging nettle extract, work to reduce swelling by constricting blood vessels and alleviating pressure on the skin. Additionally, the cream's soothing and calming effects can help to ease discomfort and relieve tension in the affected area. Vasodilation properties: The cream's active ingredients, including caffeic acid and quercetin, can help dilate blood vessels, improving circulation and reducing fluid buildup in the feet, which alleviates swelling and discomfort.

Antioxidant properties: Stinging nettle creams contain antioxidants that help protect the skin from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to inflammation and tissue damage, ultimately helping to reduce swollen feet.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the stinging nettle plant have anti-inflammatory properties, making them an effective ingredient in reducing swelling and pain associated with swollen feet.
Seeds: Stinging nettle seeds contain fatty acids and antioxidants, which can help to soothe and calm inflamed skin, reducing redness and discomfort.
remedy_recipe: Harvest and dry urtica dioica leaves in small batches for at least four weeks before processing.
Combine one part dried urtica dioica leaves with two parts coconut oil in a clean glass jar.
Steep the mixture in a warm dark place for six to eight hours allowing the herbs to infuse.
Strain the oil through cheesecloth into another container discarding the solids and squeezing out excess liquid.
Mix 10 percent beeswax with the infused oil and heat at low temperature stirring occasionally until smooth consistency.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Guelder rose creams helps with swollen feet because they possess anti-inflammatory properties that effectively reduce swelling and pain. The cream's active ingredients, such as berberine and gentian, work to ease fluid retention and relax tense muscles, allowing for improved circulation and reduced inflammation. Additionally, the natural antiseptic and antibacterial properties of guelder rose help to prevent infections and promote a healthy environment for healing. This results in relief from swollen and uncomfortable feet, leaving them feeling calm, refreshed, and rejuvenated.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Guelder rose contains flavonoids and phenolic acids that have anti-inflammatory effects, which can help reduce swelling and pain in the feet by blocking the production of pro-inflammatory enzymes.

Antioxidant: The herb's antioxidant properties can help protect the skin from free radical damage caused by inflammation and oxidative stress, promoting healthy skin cell function and reducing the appearance of swollen feet.
Venotonic: Guelder rose has been traditionally used to improve blood circulation, which can help reduce swelling in the feet by increasing blood flow and promoting lymphatic drainage.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in bioactive compounds that help reduce inflammation and alleviate pain associated with swollen feet.
Bark: Containing tannins and flavonoids, which provide a soothing and anti-inflammatory effect on sore skin.
remedy_recipe: Gather dried viburnum opulus flowers and essential oils according to your required dosage.
Boil the dried flowers in water for 15 minutes to create a fragrant tea-like infusion.
Mix the cooled infusion with beeswax and coconut oil in a ratio of 1:2:3 by weight.
Add 10 drops of peppermint essential oil and stir well to combine the mixture.
Allow the mixture to cool and thicken for at least an hour before pouring into jars.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Valerian creams helps with swollen feet because of its unique ability to reduce inflammation and soothe tired muscles. The cream's active ingredients, such as valerenic acid and isovaleric acid, work together to calm irritated skin and promote blood circulation. As a result, the swelling and discomfort associated with swollen feet are alleviated, leaving the feet feeling softer, smoother, and more relaxed. Additionally, valerian creams' anti-inflammatory properties help to reduce pain and discomfort, making it an effective natural remedy for swollen feet.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Valerian's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as isovaleric acid, reduce swelling and pain in the feet by inhibiting prostaglandins, which are hormones that cause inflammation.
Vasodilatory: Valerian's ability to dilate blood vessels helps improve circulation, reducing fluid buildup and pressure on the feet, thereby alleviating swelling and discomfort.
Antispasmodic: Valerian's antispasmodic properties help relax muscles and reduce muscle cramps, spasms, and stiffness in the feet, which can contribute to swelling and pain.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in valerenic acid, which helps to reduce inflammation and ease pain in swollen feet.
Rhizomes: Contains valeranone, a compound that has anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in soothing swollen feet.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality valeriana officinalis roots, rinsing thoroughly and chopping into small pieces for infusion.
Combine 20g of dried valeriana root with 100ml of hot water in a heat-resistant glass container for 10 minutes steeping time.
Strain the infused liquid through cheesecloth or a coffee filter into a clean bowl, discarding solids and setting liquid aside for cooling.
Mix 250g of shea butter and 150g of coconut oil with 20ml of the cooled valeriana infusion in a double boiler, whipping until smooth consistency is reached.
Transfer the cream to sterilized glass jars, sealing tightly and labeling with date and ingredients used.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Comfrey creams helps with swollen feet because of its unique ability to reduce inflammation and promote circulation. The herb's allantoin content soothes and calms irritated skin, while its glycosides and triterpenoids help to break down excess fluids that contribute to swelling. By applying comfrey cream directly to the affected area, it provides a cooling and decongesting effect that can quickly alleviate discomfort and reduce swelling, leaving feet feeling refreshed and revitalized.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory property: Comfrey's allantoin and rosmarinic acid content helps reduce swelling by reducing inflammation, making it an effective treatment for swollen feet.

Antioxidant property: Comfrey's antioxidant properties help protect against free radicals that can damage skin cells and contribute to inflammation, allowing the cream to soothe and calm irritated skin on the feet.

Wound-healing property: Comfrey's triterpenoids, such as ursolic acid and oleanolic acid, stimulate collagen synthesis and improve wound healing, which can help alleviate swelling by promoting healthy tissue repair.
remedy_parts: Roots: Comfrey roots are rich in allantoin, a natural anti-inflammatory compound that helps reduce swelling and promotes skin regeneration.
Rhyzomes: Comfrey rhyzomes have high levels of rosmarinic acid, an antioxidant that aids in reducing inflammation and pain associated with swollen feet.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh symphytum officinale leaves measuring one ounce dried or two ounces fresh for every four fluid ounces of carrier oil.
Chop the harvested symphytum officinale leaves into small pieces and combine with the chosen carrier oil in a clean glass jar.
Place the jar in a cool dark place allowing the mixture to macerate for 14 days to release the herbal properties.
Strain the liquid using cheesecloth or a coffee filter squeezing out as much of the herb infused oil as possible into a clean container.
Mix one part of the symphytum officinale infused oil with three parts of beeswax and heat gently until melted and smooth for preparation.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Dog holly creams helps with swollen feet because they contain natural anti-inflammatory compounds that effectively reduce swelling and ease discomfort. The cream's active ingredients, such as arnica and peppermint, work together to improve circulation, relax muscles, and reduce puffiness. As a result, swollen feet feel more comfortable and rejuvenated, making it easier to move around and engage in daily activities without pain or stiffness.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory compounds: Dog holly contains anti-inflammatory compounds such as flavonoids, terpenes, and alkaloids which help to reduce inflammation and swelling in the feet, providing relief from pain and discomfort.

Antioxidant activity: The antioxidants present in dog holly cream help to neutralize free radicals that can cause damage to tissues and exacerbate swelling, promoting a healthy and balanced environment for the skin and underlying tissues.

Vasodilatory properties: Dog holly's vasodilatory properties help to relax blood vessels, improving circulation and reducing pressure on the feet and ankles, which can contribute to swelling and discomfort.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in anti-inflammatory compounds, which help reduce swelling and discomfort in the feet.
Rhizomes: Contain mucilages that soothe and calm irritated skin, making them ideal for topical application on swollen feet.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh ruscus aculeatus leaves measuring 20 grams for every 100 milliliters of cream base.
Dry the harvested leaves in a warm air dryer at 40°c for 4 hours or until brittle and crumbly.
Combine 10% of dried ruscus aculeatus powder with 90% of sweet almond oil and beeswax, melting mixture in a double boiler.
Stir mixture for 20 minutes before adding vitamin e oil and essential oils, heating gently to 60°c for 15 minutes.
Remove from heat, let cool slightly before pouring into sterilized containers and storing at room temperature for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Fennel creams help with swollen feet because of their natural anti-inflammatory properties. The antioxidants present in fennel work to reduce swelling and alleviate discomfort, providing instant relief from tired and achy feet. Additionally, fennel's diuretic effects help to eliminate excess fluid retention, reducing puffiness and softening hardened skin. Regular use of fennel creams can leave your feet feeling refreshed, revitalized, and looking smooth and supple.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory compounds: Fennel contains anti-inflammatory compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids, which help reduce inflammation and swelling in the feet by blocking the production of pro-inflammatory enzymes.

Antioxidant properties: The antioxidant properties of fennel cream help protect the skin from free radical damage, which can contribute to oxidative stress and inflammation that leads to swollen feet.
Diuretic effects: Fennel's diuretic properties help increase urine production, which can help reduce fluid retention and alleviate swelling in the feet.
remedy_parts: Roots: Fennel roots have anti-inflammatory properties, making them effective in reducing swelling and discomfort associated with swollen feet.
Seeds: Fennel seeds contain flavonoids and phenolic acids that help reduce inflammation and promote relaxation, alleviating symptoms of swollen feet.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh foeniculum vulgare leaves in the early morning misty air for maximum potency.
Dry the harvested leaves in a warm dark place at room temperature for 7-10 days.
Combine 20 grams of dried foeniculum vulgare leaves with 100 milliliters of cold pressed sweet almond oil and 50 grams of beeswax in a double boiler.
Heat the mixture over low heat while stirring occasionally for 30 minutes or until the beeswax is fully dissolved.
Remove from heat and let cool to room temperature before pouring into sterilized jars and storing in the refrigerator.

intro_desc: Herbal creams for swollen feet are topical treatments that combine natural herbs with moisturizing properties to alleviate discomfort and reduce swelling. Examples of these creams include arnica, aloe vera, and chamomile. By reducing inflammation and promoting circulation, these creams help to ease the pain and discomfort associated with swollen feet. This can greatly improve the quality of life for individuals with conditions such as edema or varicose veins, allowing them to walk and engage in daily activities with greater ease.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to swollen feet that are treated with herbal creams are varicose veins, eczema, and acne. Herbal creams containing ingredients like aloe vera, tea tree oil, and witch hazel help reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritation, and promote wound healing. These creams can also improve circulation, reduce swelling, and relieve pain associated with these conditions.
supplementary_best_treatment: The best combination of herbal creams that help with swollen feet is a blend of arnica, peppermint, and chamomile. Arnica helps reduce inflammation and soothe pain, while peppermint cools and relaxes the feet. Chamomile, with its calming properties, promotes relaxation and reduces swelling. These creams can be applied topically, massaged into the affected area, and left on overnight for maximum effect. This combination works synergistically to provide relief from swollen and tired feet, promoting overall foot health and well-being.
intro_study: For example, according to a study published by Inflammopharmacology, herbal creams containing active constituents of plants such as Globularia Arabica, Rhus coriaria L., Neolamarckia cadamba, and others have been found to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and stimulate angiogenesis in diabetic wounds. The study, which involved a conventional management protocol for treating diabetic foot syndrome, found that these herbal creams may also reduce the need for amputations, a complication that affects 25% of diabetic patients. By incorporating herbal creams into treatment plans, healthcare providers may be able to provide more efficient and affordable treatments for diabetic foot syndrome, which is a prevalent cause of mortality worldwide.
